elements.grid_ref: between gridB and gridC, near grid2-3, connecting เฉลียง (+0.50) down to จอดรถ/ทางเดิน (+0.20)
elements.material: ลูกตั้ง/ลูกนอนบันได ผิวปูกระเบื้องเซรามิค 8"x8", จมูกบันได อลูมิเนียมสีเงิน ร่อง PVC ขนาด 2"
elements.dimension_m: plan 3.20 wide (grid2-grid3) x 1.80 deep, with a 0.55 landing strip beyond grid3

elements.description: Section view shows a single low riser from ทางเดิน (+0.20) up to เฉลียง (+0.50) via a 0.30m total rise, sub-split into two 0.15m steps ('0.30/0.15/0.15'). This is a shallow porch-to-carport connector stair, not a full-story stair.

elements.element_id: ม้านั่ง_คสล
elements.grid_ref: within the ST.1 plan box, near gridC/grid2 corner
elements.material: ม้านั่ง ค.ส.ล. ผิวบุกระเบื้องเคลือบ 8"x8"

warnings: ST.1 sits between เฉลียง (+0.50) and จอดรถ/ทางเดิน (+0.20) per the floor plan (หน้า06) — a shallow 0.30m-total single-landing step-down, not a multi-story staircase; consistent with this being a single-story house.

The plan-view 3.20m width exactly matches the grid2-grid3 span (master grid), and the 1.80m depth roughly matches the gridB-C span (1.80m) — both fully consistent with the master grid, no dummy grid needed.
The concrete bench (ม้านั่ง ค.ส.ล.) noted on the floor plan callout is confirmed here as part of the same ST.1 detail box, built into the stair/landing area.

Individual riser count (2 steps of 0.15m each, per the '0.30/0.15/0.15' dimension breakdown) is read with medium-high confidence from the section view; this is a much simpler single-flight-of-2-risers stair than house 1's ST.1/ST.2 (which connected a full +0.60 floor level down to grade).
